Order Custom Apartment Yard Signs for Property Marketing & Vacancy Advertising

Custom apartment yard signs are essential marketing tools for property managers, leasing offices, and apartment complexes looking to attract tenants and promote available units. These professional corrugated plastic signs are perfect for displaying rental information, directing traffic to leasing offices, advertising open houses, and announcing new construction or renovations.

Our apartment yard signs are digitally printed in full color on durable 4mm white corrugated plastic material with hollow flutes running horizontally. This lightweight, waterproof material withstands outdoor weather conditions while maintaining vibrant colors and clear messaging for maximum visibility to potential tenants and visitors.

Available in single-sided or double-sided printing options, these versatile signs can accommodate various apartment marketing needs. From "Now Leasing" and "Apartments Available" messaging to directional signage and contact information, custom apartment yard signs provide cost-effective visibility for your property.

Key Features for Apartment Marketing:

  • Full-color digital printing on weather-resistant corrugated plastic
  • Single or double-sided printing options
  • Lightweight design for easy installation and repositioning
  • Available H-stakes and mounting accessories
  • Custom sizes from 12" x 12" up to 48" x 96"
  • Professional finishing with white margins or full-bleed printing

Important Sizing Note: All corrugated plastic yard signs are trimmed 1/8" on each side during finishing (example: an 18" x 24" sign will measure 17.75" x 23.75"). For precision applications, please contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300.

Large Sign Scoring: Signs exceeding 32" x 48" or with combined height and width over 81 inches are automatically scored and folded for shipping efficiency. Contact us for flat shipping options if needed.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Apartment Yard Sign Materials for Outdoor Property Display

Our apartment yard signs are manufactured using premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast), specifically chosen for its durability and performance in outdoor property marketing applications. This material features hollow flutes similar to cardboard construction, running horizontally across the sheet for optimal strength and weather resistance.

Corrugated Plastic Material Benefits:

  • Weather Resistant: Waterproof construction withstands rain, snow, and outdoor exposure
  • Lightweight: Easy installation and repositioning for changing property needs
  • Durable: Maintains structural integrity in outdoor conditions
  • Print Compatible: Smooth surface accepts vibrant full-color digital printing
  • Cost-Effective: Affordable material for multiple sign applications

Material Specifications:

  • 4mm thickness corrugated plastic substrate
  • White base material for optimal print quality
  • Horizontal flute direction for strength
  • Suitable for temperatures from -40°F to 180°F
  • Chemical resistant and fade-resistant

This material combination makes apartment yard signs ideal for extended outdoor display while maintaining professional appearance and readability essential for effective property marketing.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Apartment Yard Sign Finishing & Installation Options

Professional finishing options enhance the durability and appearance of apartment yard signs while providing flexible installation solutions for various property marketing applications.

Print Finishing Options:

  • 1/2" White Margin: Standard border provides clean, professional appearance
  • Full Bleed: Ink coverage extends to sign edges for maximum color impact
  • Single-Sided: Standard option for basic property advertising needs
  • Double-Sided: Maximizes visibility from multiple directions

Installation Accessories Available:

  • H-Stakes: Available for 10"x15", 10"x24", and 10"x30" applications
  • Beefy Stakes: Heavy-duty mounting for larger signs or high-wind areas
  • 12" Black Zip Ties: Secure mounting to fencing or posts
  • 36" White Zip Ties: Extended length for larger mounting applications

Large Sign Handling:

Signs exceeding 32" x 48" or with combined dimensions over 81 inches are automatically scored and folded for efficient shipping. Scoring cuts through the top layer only, allowing the sign to fold without compromising the printed surface. This process ensures safe delivery while maintaining sign integrity.

For applications requiring flat delivery of large signs, our oversized flat shipping service is available. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 to discuss specific requirements and pricing.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Apartment Sign Production & Turnaround Times

Flexible production scheduling accommodates urgent property marketing needs and planned apartment advertising campaigns with multiple turnaround options.

1 Business Day Priority Production:

  • Fastest turnaround for urgent apartment marketing needs
  • Orders approved by 5:00 PM CST process the same day
  • Emergency same-day service available in select cases
  • Ideal for immediate vacancy advertising

2 Business Days Express Production:

  • Rapid turnaround for time-sensitive property campaigns
  • Balances speed with cost efficiency
  • Perfect for weekend open house preparation

3 Business Days Standard Production:

  • Most popular option offering free fast turnaround
  • Ideal for regular apartment marketing materials
  • Standard choice for planned advertising campaigns

5 Business Days Saver Production:

  • Cost-effective option for advance planning
  • Best value for bulk apartment sign orders
  • Perfect when immediate installation is not required

Production Timeline Notes:

  • Turnaround begins after file upload completion and approval
  • Proof requests pause production until approval is received
  • Prepress issues may affect timeline - customer service will notify immediately
  • Production time does not include shipping time to destination
  • Orders after 5:00 PM CST begin processing the following business day
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Apartment Yard Sign Payment & Ordering Options

Convenient payment methods accommodate property management companies, leasing offices, and individual property owners with flexible options to complete apartment sign orders efficiently.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Business Checks: Must be received before production begins
  • Secure Processing: Cards are not charged until order approval

Payment Process:

  • All apartment yard signs require payment before production
  • Credit card authorization occurs only after order approval
  • Check payments must clear before manufacturing begins
  • No charges applied to cancelled or modified orders before approval

Business Check Orders:

Property management companies and businesses may pay by check for apartment sign orders. Checks must be received and cleared before production begins. For detailed check ordering procedures and mailing instructions, please reference our check payment guidelines or contact customer service at (320) 391-5300.

Order Approval Process:

Upon order placement, customers receive confirmation with order details and artwork specifications. For proof requests, production begins only after customer approval is received. This ensures apartment signs meet exact requirements before manufacturing.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Apartment Yard Sign Delivery

Reliable shipping ensures apartment yard signs arrive safely and on schedule for property marketing campaigns and leasing office needs.

Standard Shipping Methods:

  • UPS Ground: 1-3 day delivery to 90% of United States (standard option)
  • UPS Three Day: 3 business days guaranteed delivery
  • UPS Two Day: 2 business days for time-sensitive campaigns
  • UPS Overnight: Next business day delivery
  • UPS Overnight AM: Morning delivery for urgent needs

Economy Shipping Option:

Cost-effective alternative for non-urgent apartment sign orders. May add 5-10 additional days depending on destination. Include complete address information including P.O. Box numbers in the "Address Two" field during checkout for reliable delivery.

Shipping Cost Factors:

  • Package weight and dimensions
  • Destination location
  • Selected delivery speed
  • Additional charges apply to oversized orders

International Shipping:

Available through USPS and UPS with customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. Contact customer service for detailed international shipping procedures and requirements.

Delivery Protection:

  • Tracking numbers provided for all shipments
  • Damaged items must be returned for replacement processing
  • Lost packages replaced after carrier confirms loss (7-10 business days)
  • Natural disasters and carrier delays are not covered for refunds
  • Standard shipping carrier terms and conditions apply

Production Facilities:

Apartment yard signs are produced in Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities based on customer location and order specifications for optimal delivery efficiency.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Apartment Complex Marketing & Property Management Uses for Yard Signs

Custom apartment yard signs serve multiple property management and leasing applications, providing cost-effective visibility for rental properties and apartment communities.

Vacancy Advertising:

  • "Now Leasing" announcements for available units
  • "Apartments Available" with contact information
  • Specific unit availability (1BR, 2BR, 3BR)
  • Move-in specials and promotional rates
  • Immediate occupancy notifications

Directional & Wayfinding:

  • Leasing office location and hours
  • Property entrance identification
  • Visitor parking designation
  • Amenity locations (pool, clubhouse, mailboxes)
  • Emergency contact information display

Property Development Marketing:

  • New construction announcements
  • Pre-leasing campaigns for upcoming properties
  • Grand opening celebrations
  • Renovation and improvement notifications
  • Coming soon messaging for new amenities

Open House & Tour Promotion:

  • Open house scheduling and times
  • Model unit tour availability
  • Special showing appointments
  • Weekend leasing events
  • Property tour directions

Community Communication:

  • Resident notices and announcements
  • Community events and activities
  • Temporary policy changes
  • Maintenance schedules and updates
  • Seasonal messaging and holiday greetings

The versatility and professional appearance of apartment yard signs make them essential tools for effective property management communication and successful leasing campaigns.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Apartment Yard Sign Artwork Requirements for Printing

Professional artwork specifications ensure apartment yard signs print with optimal quality, color accuracy, and visual impact for effective property marketing.

Preferred File Formats:

  • .EPS files converted to outline: Best print quality and color accuracy
  • High-resolution PDF: Maintains vector graphics and text clarity
  • High-resolution TIFF: Minimum 300 DPI for photo-quality results
  • High-resolution JPG: 300 DPI or higher for sharp image reproduction

File Size and Upload Requirements:

  • Maximum file size: 60 MB for standard upload
  • Files exceeding 60 MB require special handling - contact (320) 391-5300
  • Multiple design variations count as separate sign orders
  • Each unique apartment sign design requires individual pricing

Design Specifications:

  • Resolution: 300 DPI minimum for crisp text and graphics
  • Color Mode: CMYK color space for accurate print reproduction
  • Text Size: Minimum 24-point for optimal outdoor readability
  • Bleed Area: Add 0.25" bleed for full-bleed designs
  • Safe Area: Keep important text 0.5" from edges

Artwork Review Services:

  • Professional Design Assessment: Our graphic designers review file quality
  • Color Critical Projects: Color Match Proof System available
  • File Quality Consultation: Free assessment of submitted artwork
  • Design Assistance: Professional graphic design services available

Proofing Options:

  • Order Proof: Low-resolution preview with order details and pricing
  • Production Hold: Orders await customer approval before manufacturing
  • Color Match Proof: Physical proof for color-critical apartment branding

For apartment signs with questionable file quality or specific color matching requirements, our experienced graphic design team provides consultation to ensure optimal results for property marketing applications.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Custom Apartment Yard Signs Today

Transform your apartment marketing with professional custom yard signs designed for maximum visibility and tenant attraction. Our durable corrugated plastic signs deliver the professional appearance and weather resistance essential for effective property advertising.

Why Choose Banners.com for Apartment Yard Signs:

Expert Customer Service: Our 100% in-house customer service team consists of friendly, professional graphic designers ready to assist with your apartment signage needs.

Flexible Production Times: Choose from 1, 2, 3, or 5-day production options to meet your property marketing schedule and leasing deadlines.

Premium Quality Materials: All apartment signs are manufactured using the finest corrugated plastic materials and printed with the latest digital technology for vibrant, long-lasting results.

Live Order Tracking: Monitor your apartment sign order progress every step of the way with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

Three Easy Design Options:

  1. Select a Template: Choose from apartment-specific templates or blank options for customization
  2. Upload Your File: Submit print-ready artwork for professional production
  3. Professional Design Service: Let our graphic designers create custom apartment signage for your property

Complete Your Order:

  • Select apartment yard sign size and quantity
  • Choose single or double-sided printing
  • Add H-stakes or mounting accessories
  • Select your preferred design method
  • Review and approve artwork specifications

Ready to attract more tenants with professional apartment yard signs? Contact our design team at (320) 391-5300 or request a free sample packet to experience our material quality firsthand.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Apartment Yard Signs

What sizes are available for apartment yard signs?

We offer apartment yard signs in sizes ranging from 12" x 12" up to 48" x 96". Popular sizes for apartment marketing include 18" x 24", 24" x 36", and 24" x 48". Custom sizes are also available for specific property needs.

How long do apartment yard signs last outdoors?

Our corrugated plastic apartment signs are designed for extended outdoor use. The waterproof material and fade-resistant inks typically maintain quality for 6-12 months of continuous outdoor exposure, depending on weather conditions.

Can I order different apartment signs with unique designs?

Yes, each unique design is treated as a separate sign order with individual pricing. This allows property managers to create specific messaging for different units, amenities, or promotional offers.

What installation options are available for apartment signs?

We offer H-stakes in multiple sizes (10x15, 10x24, 10x30), heavy-duty Beefy Stakes for windy conditions, and zip ties in 12" and 36" lengths for fence or post mounting.

Do large apartment signs get folded for shipping?

Signs exceeding 32" x 48" or with combined dimensions over 81 inches are automatically scored and folded for efficient shipping. This process doesn't damage the printed surface but allows compact delivery. Flat shipping is available for an additional fee.

Can apartment signs be printed on both sides?

Yes, double-sided printing is available for all apartment yard sign sizes. This option maximizes visibility from multiple directions and is ideal for corner locations or high-traffic areas.

What production time should I choose for urgent apartment marketing?

For immediate needs, choose 1-day Priority production. For weekend open houses or time-sensitive campaigns, 2-day Express provides fast turnaround. Standard 3-day production works well for planned marketing campaigns.

Are apartment yard signs suitable for all weather conditions?

Yes, our corrugated plastic material is waterproof and designed to withstand rain, snow, wind, and temperature variations from -40°F to 180°F, making them ideal for year-round apartment marketing.

Can I get a proof before my apartment signs are printed?

Yes, order proofs are available and include a low-resolution preview of your design along with complete order details. Production is paused until you approve the proof to ensure satisfaction with your apartment signage.

What file format works best for apartment sign artwork?

EPS files converted to outline provide the best print quality. We also accept high-resolution PDF, TIFF, and JPG files at 300 DPI or higher for optimal results on apartment yard signs.
